name: spawn_subagent
description: Spawn a fabri sub-agent dynamically by config path. Use when the parent agent needs to pick a sub-agent at runtime (vs. the static `tools.agents[]` form, which fixes the choice at config load). The sub-agent runs as a fresh agent_runner_tool.py subprocess; optional system_prompt_inline / system_prompt_path overrides the sub-agent's configured prompt for this one call. `additional_context` is prepended to the task. `parallel_group` is a metadata tag the parent runner loop reads to fan out spawn calls concurrently (see F2). Returns the sub-agent's {final_text, outcome, session_id, trace_path}.
